tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The results show a mildly elevated HbA1c (6.2%), indicating impaired glucose regulation or possible prediabetes. All other parameters, including renal function, electrolytes, and glucose, are within normal limits except for a borderline high chloride, which is likely not clinically significant. Recommend follow-up for glycemic control.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
